'''Droids by Janice''' was a small [[Droid/Legends|droid]] shop located in the [[Upper City]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was owned by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Janice Nall]], who—although skilled—had few customers due to her [[Species/Legends|species]]. She sold droid upgrades and parts during the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire's]] occupation of the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which includes the appearance of [[Droid/Legends|Droids]] by [[Janice Nall|Janice]], in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] came by the shop to acquire the upgraded [[Cleaning droid/Legends|utility droid]] [[T3-M4]], who was commissioned by [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Davik Kang]] and had the slicing skill to crack the security system at the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Tarisian military base|military base]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
